rows.title: XTREME 12V MAX* 1/4 in. Brushless Impact Driver (Tool Only)
rows.description: Complete precision fastening applications in tight spaces without sacrificing power with the XTREME 12V MAX* Impact Driver. At only 5.05 in. long (front to back) with up to 1,450 in-lbs. of torque, this impact driver is designed COMPACT AND PERFORMANCE PACKED. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: 52% more torque**
19% shorter**
Brushless motor for maximum runtime and durability
additional_features: 1/4 in. quick release drop and load hex that accepts 1 in. bit tips
3 mode settings including the Precision Drive feature for accuracy
3 LEDs on nose for work surface illumination
Lightweight at 1.75 lbs. (tool only)
includes: (1) DCF801B - 12V MAX* Brushless 1/4 in. Impact Driver
disclaimers: ** DCF801 using DCB122 2.0Ah battery vs. DCF815 using DCB120 1.3Ah battery (sold separately).
* Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 12 volts. Nominal voltage is 10.8.

rows.title: ATOMIC 20V MAX* 1/4 in. Brushless Compact Impact Driver (Tool Only)
rows.description: Tackle tough jobs and maneuver in small spaces with the ATOMIC 20V MAX* 1/4 in. Compact Impact Driver. At only 5.1 in. (front to back), this Impact Driver features 1,700 in-lbs. of torque and an ergonomically designed handle for premium control in demanding applications. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: Only 5.1 in. in length to fit in tight spaces
1700 in-lbs of torque delivering the power you need to get a majority of applications done
Variable speed trigger allows for control and precision on delicate work surfaces
additional_features: DEWALT built brushless motor for efficient performance and runtime
3 bright LEDs for dimly lit workspaces
includes: (1) DCF809 20V Max* Brushless Compact 1/4 in. Impact Driver
applications: 3 in. deck screw in pressure treated wood
disclaimers: * Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20 volts. Nominal voltage is 18.

rows.title: 20V MAX* Brushless Cordless 1/4 in. Impact Driver (Tool Only)
rows.description: Get 1,700 in-lb. of torque and up to 3,200 rpm for driving large-diameter screws with the 20V MAX* 1/4 in. Brushless Cordless Impact Driver. Engineered to be lightweight without sacrificing performance, this compact impact driver provides optimized maneuverability and access to confined areas when performing cabinetry and framing jobs. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: High-Performance Brushless Motor - Delivers 1,700 in-lb of torque and 3,200 rpm to drive large-diameter screws
Maneuver With Ease - Compact design for optimized ergonomics and access to difficult-to-reach spots
Pro-Level Ccontrol And Precision - With variable speed trigger
additional_features: Brighten Dark Work Areas - Integrated 3-LED work light enhances visibility in low-light spaces
disclaimers: * Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20 volts. Nominal voltage is 18.

rows.title: 20V MAX* XR 3-Speed Impact 1/4 in. Driver (Tool Only)
rows.description: Experience Power and drive large diameter screws with the 20V MAX* XR 1/4 in. 3-Speed Impact Driver. Featuring a compact design and 3-speeds, this powerful impact driver delivers 1,825 in-lbs. of max torque and premium user control for a variety of applications. This product is a Chip Ready tool for seamless integration into the TOOL CONNECT system (chip sold separately). Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: Brushless Motor - Delivers 1825 in-lbs of torque and 3400 RPM to drive large diameter screws
Complete Tough Fastening Applications - On the jobsite with 30% more torque**
Pro-Level Control - And precision with variable speed trigger and 3-speed setting
additional_features: Brighten Work Areas - With an integrated 3-LED work light for ehnanced visibility in low-light areas
includes: (1) DCF845 20V MAX* XR 1/4 in. 3-Speed Impact Driver
disclaimers: * Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20 volts. Nominal voltage is 18.
**Rated Torque vs. DCF885 Impact Driver with Rated Torque of 1400 in-lbs

rows.title: ATOMIC 20V MAX* 1/4 in. 3-Speed Brushless Impact Driver (Tool Only)
rows.description: Tackle tough jobs and maneuver in small spaces with the ATOMIC 20V MAX* 3-Speed 1/4 in. Impact Driver. At less than 4 in. (front to back), this Impact Driver features 1,825 in-lbs. of max torque and 3,250 rpm for driving large screws. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: Maneuver With Ease - Compact, under 4 in. design for optimized ergonomics and access to difficult-to-reach spots
High-Performance Brushless Motor - Drive large-diameter screws with 1,825 in-lb. of max torque and 3,250 rpm.
Pro-Level Control - Work precisely with a variable 3-speed trigger.
additional_features: Brighten Work Areas - Help enhance visibility in dimly lit spaces with the integrated 3-LED work light.
disclaimers: * Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20 volts. Nominal voltage is 18.

rows.title: 20V MAX* XR 1/4 in. 3-Speed Brushless High Torque Impact Driver (Tool Only)
rows.description: This 20V MAX* XR 3-Speed High Torque Impact Driver is engineered for the demands of the pro with a max torque of 2,500 in-lbs., making it our highest torque impact driver†. Maximize productivity with up to 63% faster driving**, a no-load speed of 0-3,800 RPM, 9 built-in LEDs, and 3-speed mode select to power through tough jobs. Battery and charger sold separately.
features: Our Highest Torque Impact Driver† - Take on tough jobs with up to 66% more torque††.
Fast, Efficient Performance - Work efficiently with up to 63% faster driving**.

Pro-Level Control - Get precise performance with a variable speed trigger and 3-speed mode select. Speeds 1 and 2 are optimized to match the installation speeds of commonly used self-drilling and tapping screws. Refer to the impact driver manual and screw manufacturer instructions for proper installation.
additional_features: Pro-Level Power - Power through tough jobs with up to 2,500 in-lbs. max torque and a no-load speed up to 3,800 RPM.
Built-In LEDS - 9 built-in LEDs and 20-minute work light setting provide additional illumination.
1/4 in. QUICK-CONNECT Hex Chuck - Conveniently work with compatible 1/4 in. quick-connect hex chuck.
Simplify Asset Management - This TOOL CONNECT CHIP READY (chip sold separately) tool connects with the TOOL CONNECT Site Manager app to help you track and manage assets.
Part Of Our Best Performing Line Of 20V MAX* Power Tools - Innovative power tools designed to deliver certainty for the world's toughest pros.
includes: (1) DCF860 20V MAX* XR 3-Speed High Torque 1/4 in. Impact Driver
disclaimers: *Max initial voltage without workload is 20V. Nominal is 18V.
†Based on rated max torque
**vs. DCF787 with 3" x 3/8" lag bolt in PT 4x4 using DCB2108 (sold separately)
††Rated max torque, using DCB2108 (sold separately) vs. DCF787 (1500 in-lbs.)

‡Using DCB2108 8Ah battery (sold separately) vs. Milwaukee 2953 impact driver using 48-11-1880 8Ah battery (sold separately) with 3/4" spade bit into 2x SPF. Milwaukee is a registered trademark of Milwaukee Electric Tool Corp., which has not endorsed or approved this comparison.

‡‡Using DCB2108 8Ah battery (sold separately) vs. Milwaukee 2953 impact driver using 48-11-1880 8Ah battery (sold separately) with 3" x 3/8" lag bolt in PT 4x4 Milwaukee is a registered trademark of Milwaukee Electric Tool Corp., which has not endorsed or approved this comparison.

rows.title: 20V MAX* XR Brushless Cordless 3-Speed High Torque 1/4 in. Impact Driver With LANYARD READY Attachment Point (Tool Only)
rows.description: This 20V MAX* XR 3-Speed High Torque Impact Driver is engineered for the demands of the pro with a max torque of 2,500 in-lbs., making it our highest torque impact driver†. Maximize productivity with up to 63% faster driving**, a no-load speed of 0-3,800 RPM, 9 built-in LEDs, and 3-speed mode select to power through tough jobs. LANYARD READY attachment point is designed for users to utilize a lanyard to tether the tool and battery to rigid structures on jobsites. When working at height only use LANYARD READY equipped batteries (sold separately). Battery and charger sold separately.

rows.title: 20V MAX* XR Brushless Cordless 1/4 in. Quiet Hydraulic Impact Driver (Tool Only)
rows.description: Complete framing, cabinetry, and other applications in tight areas with our quietest impact driver‡. The 20V MAX* XR Brushless Cordless 1/4 in. Quiet Hydraulic Impact Driver helps reduce noise disturbance in sensitive environments with up to 57% quieter operation**. Featuring an advanced hydraulic mechanism, this impact driver delivers consistent performance for demanding applications in tough conditions. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: Our Quietest Impact Driver‡ - Reduce noise disturbances with up to 57% quieter** operation.
Up To 40% Faster Driving*** - Drive large screws quickly and finish jobs fast.
Up to 195% Faster Driving - Vs. Milwaukee††
additional_features: Up to 250% Faster Driving - 5 Lags vs. Milwaukee†††
Advanced Engineering - provides consistent performance in demanding applications and performs in cold temperatures
Designed For Tight Spaces - Complete framing, cabinetry, and other applications in tight areas with an ergonomic design.
Up To 6X Brighter‡‡ - Help illuminate work areas with 9 LEDs featuring a 20 minute work light mode.
Part Of Our Best Performing Line Of 20V MAX* Power Tools - Innovative power tools designed to deliver certainty for the world's toughest pros.

rows.title: 20V MAX* XR Brushless Cordless Impact Driver With TOOL CONNECT (Tool Only)
rows.description: Experience Power and complete tough jobs in tight spaces with the 20V MAX* XR Impact Driver featuring TOOL CONNECT technology. This Bluetooth-enabled product delivers efficient out-of-the-box compatibility to the TOOL CONNECT inventory management system. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: LAST SEEN feature helps reduce wasted time and money by providing the street address of where your impact driver was last in range of your Tool Connect-enabled device
Easily and quickly assign tools to jobsites and users on the Tool Connect Inventory Manager software, increasing accountability and reducing lost tools
Receive diagnostics on your impact driver like internal coin cell battery life, temperature, number of trigger pulls, and how long the tool has been running
additional_features: Set "disable when out of range" alerts to help deter unauthorized use or theft
Once you've downloaded the Tool Connect app, easily pair with the app by holding down the pair button on the tool foot for 3-5 seconds
Customize your impact driverfrom your Tool Connect app, including speed and torque, the Precision Drive control feature and LED light brightness and delay
DEWALT brushless motor delivers up to 75% more runtime vs. 18V NiCad brushed motors
Compact (5.3" front to back), lightweight (2.8 lbs without battery) design fits into tight areas
Use Precision Drive in speed 1 for precise applications and added control
Includes a default Home mode and 3 programmable modes to customize speed and light brightness
disclaimers: * Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20 volts. Nominal voltage is 18.
